title: picris angustifolia subsp. morrisonensis
intro: Picris angustifolia subsp. morrisonensis, also known as Taiwanese picris or narrow-leaved picris, is a plant species within the Picris genus, which is native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Picris angustifolia subsp. morrisonensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
